data.raceComments: {"comment":"7. NOTHING FORMAL has his first outing after running last in a four dog trial (17.21) on this track over 295m. Is produced by a powerful kennel and a bold showing expected. 3. STORM JUNIOR has mixed form recently, finishing sixth (26.87) in a Class 0 at Ascot Park latest but did run well two back when in the frame. Didn't handle the track last start and expected to do much better now back to this course. 8. OPAWA WINTER has hit the frame in both career runs, the latest when third (26.69) over 457m at Ascot Park. Overdue for a win and looks a leading chance here. ","runners":[7,3,8],"exclusive":false}
